rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Against Respondent David M Scafani And For Prejudgment Interest And Costs, And For Attorneys Fees; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Richard A Canatella With Exhibits; Request For Judicial Notice; Proof Of Service By Mail
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling: Off calendar. No compliance with CCP 1015. The motion was not served on the attorney of record for David M. Scafani.
